title: Faithless Centered Crosshair
description: Centered Crosshair fix for Faithless Resource Pack
body:
<details>
<summary>En</summary>

Centered Crosshair fix for Faithless Resource Pack

Make sure that the right priority of loading resource packs:

![Right Priority](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf1ce948dc40b8ac86a8c88a9b2ab60060c03d6.png)

Original Resourse Pack on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithless) and [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ру</summary>

Отцентрованный прицел для РП Faithless

Убедитесь, что стоит правильный приоритет загрузки ресурспаков:

![Right Priority](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf1ce948dc40b8ac86a8c88a9b2ab60060c03d6.png)

Оригинальный ресурспак на [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithless) и [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless)

</details>
